pages.text: These are the tighter Oathbound curios: stronger identity, sharper role, and a closer link to the Branded path. In plain terms, they reward committing to a combat style instead of being generic stat sticks.
While burning, your attacks deal $(l)35% more damage$() by default. This is a high-risk offensive relic for players willing to turn pain into pressure.
On kill, gain $(l)Speed I for 8s$() and $(l)Regeneration I for 4s$(). It rewards keeping momentum after a kill.
Deal $(l)25% more damage$() to enemies that are already targeting you. It rewards standing your ground instead of opening from safety.
While Branded, gain $(l)+10% movement speed$(). It is the cleanest mobility relic in the early Oathbound line.
